title: Simple Invisible Light
description: A datapack that adds an easy-to-craft and use, invisible survival light.
body:
**Tired of perpetually interfering flares? Not a problem!**
The "Simple Invisible Light" datapack is designed to solve your lighting problems. **It's easy to craft an invisible light unit.**
Take 8 yellow glass panels, 1 torch in the middle, and the invisible light unit is ready! - An example of a craft:
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6109c13b3c8f97a102d1965302fd0cb879cb20a5.png)
